title: "Tsunami" of immigration cases strains U.S. Attorney's offices across America
description: As immigration sweeps expand nationwide, the work of justifying detentions is overwhelming federal prosecutors, who are being forced to sideline a range of other cases in order to keep pace.
content: As immigration sweeps and detentions have expanded in Minnesota and around the country, the work of justifying those detentions is overwhelming federal prosecutors, who are being forced to sideline a… [+7661 chars]
de: „Tsunami“ an Einwanderungsfällen belastet US-Staatsanwaltschaften in ganz Amerika. Während sich die Einwanderungskontrollen landesweit ausweiten, überfordert die Arbeit der Rechtfertigung von Inhaftierungen die Bundesanwälte, die gezwungen sind, eine Reihe anderer Fälle außer Acht zu lassen, um mithalten zu können.
en: "Tsunami" of immigration cases strains U.S. Attorney's offices across America. As immigration sweeps expand nationwide, the work of justifying detentions is overwhelming federal prosecutors, who are being forced to sideline a range of other cases in order to keep pace.
la: "Tsunami" de casibus immigrationis modos US Attornatus officiis trans Americam. Cum immigratio dilatat nationem, opus iustificandi detentiones accusatores foederatos opprimit, qui coguntur in aliis casibus distendere ut gressum acquirant.
